mnemonics: PAIRS: Privacy, Accountability, Integrity, Responsibility, Security for AI ethics
FAT: Fairness, Accountability, Transparency in AI decision-making
keyPoints: Respect for autonomy in AI decision-making
Non-maleficence: do no harm through AI systems
Beneficence: promote good and prevent harm with AI
Justice: ensure fairness and equity in AI applications
commonMistakes: Ignoring bias in AI training data
Overlooking transparency in AI decision-making processes
Failing to consider human values in AI system design
